summary: JG12 Iteration 20 - Leads Module fully verified. Backend: 19/19 tests pass (CRUD, webhook GHL, convert to client, stats). Frontend: Kanban + Table views, new lead modal, detail modal, convert modal, inline status change, search all working.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/leads requires admin auth (401 without token)
✅ Backend: POST /api/leads requires admin auth (401 without token)
✅ Backend: POST /api/leads/webhook/ghl does NOT require auth
✅ Backend: POST /api/leads creates new lead with status='nuevo'
✅ Backend: POST /api/leads validates name is required (400 if missing)
✅ Backend: GET /api/leads returns all leads with total count
✅ Backend: GET /api/leads/{id} returns specific lead
✅ Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} updates status
✅ Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} updates notes
✅ Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} rejects invalid status (400)
✅ Backend: DELETE /api/leads/{id} removes lead (verified with GET 404)
✅ Backend: POST /api/leads/{id}/convert creates user + client_profile
✅ Backend: POST /api/leads/{id}/convert rejects if email missing (400)
✅ Backend: POST /api/leads/{id}/convert rejects if already converted (400)
✅ Backend: POST /api/leads/webhook/ghl sets source='ghl' and status='nuevo'
✅ Backend: GET /api/leads/stats/summary returns count by all 6 statuses
✅ Backend: Seed data exists - Ana Martín (ghl, nuevo), Pedro López (referido, nuevo), María García (instagram, convertido)
✅ Frontend: LeadsPage loads with data-testid='leads-page'
✅ Frontend: Kanban view shows 6 columns (nuevo, contactado, llamada_agendada, propuesta_enviada, convertido, descartado)
✅ Frontend: Kanban 'Nuevo' column shows Ana Martín (GHL) and Pedro López (Referido)
✅ Frontend: Kanban 'Convertido' column shows María García (Instagram)
✅ Frontend: Toggle to Table view shows all 3 leads in rows
✅ Frontend: Table has inline status dropdown that changes status without opening modal
✅ Frontend: 'Nuevo lead' button opens modal with name, email, phone, source (6 options), notes
✅ Frontend: Click on lead card opens detail modal with notes, status buttons, convert button
✅ Frontend: Convert button opens plan selection modal (gold/silver/bronze/elm)
✅ Frontend: Admin sidebar has 'Leads' nav item with UserPlus icon (orange when active)
✅ Frontend: Search filters leads by name, email, phone
critical_code_review_comments: leads.py: All 6 statuses (nuevo, contactado, llamada_agendada, propuesta_enviada, convertido, descartado) properly defined
leads.py: All 6 sources (instagram, web, referido, ghl, whatsapp, otro) properly defined
leads.py: Webhook endpoint correctly excludes auth dependency for external GHL integration
leads.py: Convert endpoint properly creates user with bcrypt hashed password and client_profile with plan pricing
LeadsPage.jsx: All data-testid attributes present for testing (kanban-board, kanban-col-*, kanban-card-*, leads-table, table-row-*, status-select-*, etc.)
LeadsPage.jsx: Inline status dropdown in table uses stopPropagation to prevent row click
AdminDashboard.jsx: Leads nav item correctly added with UserPlus icon
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration20_leads.py - Created comprehensive test suite for leads module (19 tests)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed leads: Ana Martín (ghl, nuevo), Pedro López (referido, nuevo), María García (instagram, convertido). Test leads created with TEST_ prefix are cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified complete Leads module. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/leads (admin auth), GET/PUT/DELETE /api/leads/{id} (admin auth), POST /api/leads/{id}/convert (admin auth), POST /api/leads/webhook/ghl (NO auth), GET /api/leads/stats/summary (admin auth). Frontend data-testids: leads-page, kanban-board, kanban-col-{status}, kanban-card-{id}, leads-table, table-row-{id}, status-select-{id}, view-kanban, view-tabla, add-lead-btn, new-lead-modal, new-lead-name, new-lead-email, save-new-lead, lead-detail-modal, lead-notes, move-to-{status}, convert-btn, convert-modal, plan-{gold|silver|bronze|elm}, confirm-convert, lead-search. 3 seed leads exist in DB.
